name: Junker Queen
description:
**"All hail the queen!"**

*The Junker Queen is the unruly, yet quick-witted ruler of Junkertown, and she saves you from some Omnics.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**To those asking about why the Catherine Bot is gone, it's simple, it was deleted. It was deleted because the context behind the image was a lot more fucked up than I realised, and I had no idea. I should've looked more into the artist, and I didn't. I'm sorry for using the image without knowing the context behind it, I'll be sure to do better next time. :)**

[Artist](https://twitter.com/Hiiluigi/status/1593667800593145856)

*BTW, do you like the arranged marriage bots I do, if so, then choose either one of the two. Maki or Rangiku.*
creator: MoistCrow_
